headline: Heritage Railway Restoration Attracts 180,000 Tourists
context: Restored heritage railway section between Gemas and Tumpat attracted 180,000 tourists in 2025 generating RM28 million in local revenue.

cards.big: Heritage railway attracted 180,000 tourists generating RM28 million in 2025
cards.sub: Restored section uses original 1920s steam locomotives on scenic 528km route

cards.big: KTM invested RM45 million in track restoration and heritage station renovation
cards.sub: International visitors comprised 35% of passengers drawn by social media exposure

cards.big: 12 heritage stations converted to local craft and food markets along the route
cards.sub: Community-run businesses at stations earned average RM8,500 monthly per stall

cards.big: Tourism Ministry awarded heritage railway RM12 million marketing grant for 2026
cards.sub: Plan to extend heritage experience to Sabah colonial railway under consideration

cards.big: Heritage railway shows whether cultural infrastructure can generate sustainable local income
180,000 tourists from heritage railway show that preservation generates revenue, not just nostalgia.
